judgment.summary: High-growth business with strong gross margins and positive free cash flow, offset by high valuation multiples and negative net margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.25 beat the 0.23 estimate by 7.0%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth of 33.5% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 73.3% indicates high scalability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $755.00M shows healthy cash generation.
Total cash of $4.16B exceeds total debt of $3.52B.
negatives: Forward P/E of 132.29x suggests a very high valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 30.62x indicates the stock is priced for extreme growth.
Profit margin of -3.7% shows the company is not yet profitable.
Debt/Equity ratio of 230.86 is relatively high.
